headline: KeyCorp (NYSE:KEY) Scores Near-Perfect Ratings in Technical Breakout Setup
summary: KeyCorp (KEY) scores near-perfect Technical and Setup Quality ratings, making it a strong technical breakout candidate with a tight consolidation pattern and clear entry/exit levels.
